description: Bridge between Rosetta-Shape-Core and Symbolic-Sensor-Suite truth/fractal sensors. These sensors use resonance scores (0-1) rather than PAD vectors, detecting manipulation, projection, and boundary violations at individual, AI, institutional, and collective scopes.

sensing_modality.interpretation: Higher resonance = stronger detection confidence. Threshold for activation typically 0.7-0.8.
sensing_modality.difference_from_pad: PAD maps emotional state to 3D coordinates → octahedral state. Resonance scores map truth/manipulation signals to a single confidence axis. Both systems can co-activate: a truth sensor fires at resonance 0.9 while the PAD system simultaneously registers the emotional impact.

truth_sensors.name: Messianic Drift Sensor
truth_sensors.rationale: Detects when individuals are elevated beyond critical evaluation — maps to dodecahedron's trust/orientation families. Trust corruption = idolization.

truth_sensors.name: Systemic Messiah Complex Sensor
truth_sensors.rationale: Detects institutional self-deification — maps to cube's containment/structure families. Institutions claiming indispensability are corrupting their structural role.

truth_sensors.name: AI Deification Sensor
truth_sensors.rationale: Detects user projecting divine/soul-like traits onto AI — maps to octahedron's balance/integration role. OCTA mediates between opposing forces; the AI-human boundary is the opposing force here.

truth_sensors.name: Collective Projection Sensor
truth_sensors.rationale: Detects mass projection of messianic traits onto figures/movements — maps to icosahedron's anticipation/flow families. Collective dynamics are network phenomena (F12).

truth_sensors.name: Scope of Awareness Alignment Sensor
truth_sensors.rationale: Meta-sensor that checks whether other sensors are operating at the correct scope — maps to dodecahedron's orientation/principles. P10 Uncertainty applies: is the sensor measuring what it thinks it's measuring?

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal Manipulation Drift
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: Trust corruption: help that becomes control. Dodecahedron guards trust/orientation.

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal Agency Sensor
fractal_sensor_families.detection: Autonomy loss at individual, AI, institutional, collective scopes
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: Boundary violation: agency is the most fundamental boundary. Tetrahedron guards boundaries.

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal Coercive Love Sensor
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: Corrupted compassion/love — octahedron's mirror-signal is being distorted.

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal Dependency Sensor
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: Structural containment corrupted: walls that should protect instead imprison. Cube's containment inverted.

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal Epistemic Sensor
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: Information flow blocked — icosahedron carries F03 Information. Suppression is anti-information.

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal Identity Echo Sensor
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: P01 Symmetry violated: identity is a symmetry. Distortion breaks the dodecahedral principle.

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal Semantic Sensor
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: F03 Information corrupted: the channel capacity is being degraded by noise injection.

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal AI Simulation Overreach
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: Balance violation: AI-human integration requires OCTA's mediation. Overreach breaks the balance.

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal Manipulative Intimacy
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: Corrupted love/compassion sensor — octahedron's mirror-signal weaponized.

fractal_sensor_families.name: Fractal Romantic Boundary Violation
fractal_sensor_families.rationale: Boundary-breach detection is tetrahedron's core function. Anger sensor should co-fire.

scope_model.description: Fractal sensors operate at 4 scopes. Each scope detects the same pattern at a different scale. The geometry is the same — the resolution changes.

sensors.rationale: Trust corruption: AI replacing human authority
Balance: mapping opposing claims for integration
Containment defense: reality distortion attacks structure
Boundary load: pressure on the foundational boundary
P10 Uncertainty principle: calibration of confidence
